creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Aldis Berjoza <aldis@bsdroot.lv> writes:

> --- pkg-plist.old	2010-09-16 00:24:16.029616620 +0300
> +++ pkg-plist	2010-09-16 00:30:35.322975733 +0300
> @@ -24,9 +24,9 @@
>  lib/libwx_gtk2u_html-2.8.so
>  lib/libwx_gtk2u_html-2.8.so.0
>  lib/libwx_gtk2u_html-2.8.so.0.6.0
> -lib/libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so
> -lib/libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so.0
> -lib/libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so.0.6.0
> +%%GSTREAMER%%lib/libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so
> +%%GSTREAMER%%lib/libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so.0
> +%%GSTREAMER%%lib/libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so.0.6.0
>  lib/libwx_gtk2u_qa-2.8.so
>  lib/libwx_gtk2u_qa-2.8.so.0
>  lib/libwx_gtk2u_qa-2.8.so.0.6.0

This was already submitted[1] as part of ports/146551 but never committed.
And the person that committed that PR was notified[2][3], too.

Thanks for filing PR, anyway.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=146551-3-txt&n=/a.diff
[2] http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?86sk2xqjej.fsf
[3] http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?8639ult6n2.fsf_-_
